title: Repository Baseline, Go 1.26 Toolchain, Modules, and Reproduction · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Dependency Provenance
summary: The prototype runs from an unknown revision, uses an unrecorded Go toolchain, has no module identity, relies on warm caches, and cannot be rebuilt from a clean checkout. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go dependency provenance increment in reproducible Go Pokedex repository baseline. Learners progress through prediction, explic…

Choose module path, command and internal package boundaries, dependency direction, and import visibility before growth.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
